title: Blue Oceans
description: Blue Oceans is a technology-adventure mod designed to enhance the player's gaming experience by incorporating real-life items.It also includes some magical items.
body:
# Overview

Blue Oceans is a technology-adventure mod designed to enhance the player's gaming experience by incorporating real-life items, promoting the concept of harmonious coexistence between humans and nature. Of course, it also includes some magical items.**Require IXApi as a prerequisite.**

## Main Gameplay

Villagers: This mod features special villagers, some of which are improved versions of the originals (such as farmers), while others are entirely new, such as soldiers.

Red Plum: This mod introduces a new creature faction called Red Plum.

Chemistry: This mod adds various elemental ores and equipment.

Biology: This mod adds biological tools, such as petri dishes.

Physics: This mod adds items related to electricity.

Agriculture: This mod adds agricultural items, such as scythes.

Some content is still under development.
